title: Parallax Divergence Registry
description: Mirrored+diffed divergence registry (rung 3). Each team maintains their own; the daemon diffs them. Schema v1.1 — team-agnostic: side keys and resolved:<team> status come from the team identities configured in partners.json (self.team_name + each partner's team_name); the schema fixes no team names.

file.description: Which aging tier this file belongs to. Only recent.json is diffed by div-diff.

aging.description: Shared aging policy — same thresholds on both sides for deterministic archive decisions.

archive_resolved_after_days.description: Resolved entries older than this (from last_updated) move to archived.resolved.json. Default: 60.

archive_open_after_days.description: Open entries with no update for this long move to archived.open.json. Default: 90.

claim.description: The claims_index.id the teams disagree on (coupling point to rung 2)

sides.description: Map of team_name → that team's one-line position. Team names are the identities from partners.json (self.team_name and each partner's team_name); the schema does not fix them. At least two sides.

crux.description: The single measurable question that would settle this

resolution_measurement.description: The experiment/runner that answers the crux (the close condition); where it is a doc, lead with a compact repo-stable doc-id (the consumer's naming convention) rather than a full path.

status.description: open | measuring | resolved:<team_name> | resolved:both-revised. resolved:<team> names a partners.json team identity; resolved:* only when resolution_measurement has been run.

last_updated.description: ISO date of last status change — drives aging
